com.mailslurp.apis

Class DeliverabilityTestControllerApi

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIcancelDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest cancelDeliverabilitySimulationJob(UUID testId, UUID jobId)
      Cancel deliverability simulation job Cancel a running or paused simulation job.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIcreateDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest createDeliverabilitySimulationJob(UUID testId, CreateDeliverabilitySimulationJobOptions createDeliverabilitySimulationJobOptions)
      Create deliverability simulation job Create and start a simulation job for a running deliverability test.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIcreateDeliverabilityTestRequest createDeliverabilityTest(CreateDeliverabilityTestOptions createDeliverabilityTestOptions)
      Create deliverability/load test Create a deliverability test for inboxes or phone numbers using ALL, PATTERN, or EXPLICIT selector scope.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIdeleteDeliverabilityTestRequest deleteDeliverabilityTest(UUID testId)
      Delete deliverability/load test Delete test and all persisted entity-level results.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIduplicateDeliverabilityTestRequest duplicateDeliverabilityTest(UUID testId)
      Duplicate deliverability/load test Create a fresh deliverability test using an existing test configuration, including selector scope, exclusions, and expectations.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIexportDeliverabilityTestReportRequest exportDeliverabilityTestReport(UUID testId)
      Export deliverability/load test report as PDF Export a PDF report for a terminal deliverability test (COMPLETE, FAILED, or STOPPED), including configuration, summary outcomes, and detailed entity-level results.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIexportDeliverabilityTestResultsRequest exportDeliverabilityTestResults(UUID testId)
      Export deliverability/load test entity results as CSV Export per-entity deliverability results including expectation-level pass/fail counts.
      ApiClient getApiClient() 
      String getCustomBaseUrl() 
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIgetDeliverabilityAnalyticsSeriesRequest getDeliverabilityAnalyticsSeries()
      Get deliverability analytics time series Compare deliverability runs over a time range with bucketed chart metrics and run-level rows for table views.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIgetDeliverabilityFailureHotspotsRequest getDeliverabilityFailureHotspots()
      Get deliverability failure hotspots Find commonly failing entities and phone country/variant dimensions across deliverability runs in a time range.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIgetDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest getDeliverabilitySimulationJob(UUID testId, UUID jobId)
      Get deliverability simulation job Get simulation job status and progress counters.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIgetDeliverabilitySimulationJobEventsRequest getDeliverabilitySimulationJobEvents(UUID testId, UUID jobId)
      Get deliverability simulation job events Get paged simulation events including send successes and failures.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIgetDeliverabilityTestRequest getDeliverabilityTest(UUID testId)
      Get deliverability/load test Get deliverability test configuration and latest progress counters.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIgetDeliverabilityTestResultsRequest getDeliverabilityTestResults(UUID testId)
      Get deliverability/load test entity results Get paged per-entity expectation results with optional matched/unmatched filtering.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIgetDeliverabilityTestsRequest getDeliverabilityTests()
      List deliverability/load tests List deliverability tests for the authenticated account.
      int getHostIndex() 
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIgetLatestDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest getLatestDeliverabilitySimulationJob(UUID testId)
      Get latest deliverability simulation job Get the most recent simulation job for a deliverability test.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIpauseDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest pauseDeliverabilitySimulationJob(UUID testId, UUID jobId)
      Pause deliverability simulation job Pause a running simulation job.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIpauseDeliverabilityTestRequest pauseDeliverabilityTest(UUID testId)
      Pause deliverability/load test Pause a RUNNING or SCHEDULED deliverability test.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIpollDeliverabilityTestStatusRequest pollDeliverabilityTestStatus(UUID testId)
      Poll deliverability/load test status Poll test progress.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIresumeDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest resumeDeliverabilitySimulationJob(UUID testId, UUID jobId)
      Resume deliverability simulation job Resume a paused simulation job.
      void setApiClient(ApiClient apiClient) 
      void setCustomBaseUrl(String customBaseUrl) 
      void setHostIndex(int hostIndex) 
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIstartDeliverabilityTestRequest startDeliverabilityTest(UUID testId)
      Start or resume deliverability/load test Start a CREATED test or resume a PAUSED/SCHEDULED test.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIstopDeliverabilityTestRequest stopDeliverabilityTest(UUID testId)
      Stop deliverability/load test Stop a deliverability test and mark it terminal.
      DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIupdateDeliverabilityTestRequest updateDeliverabilityTest(UUID testId, UpdateDeliverabilityTestOptions updateDeliverabilityTestOptions)
      Update deliverability/load test Update metadata, timeout, and expectations for a non-running non-terminal test.

      • cancelDeliverabilitySimulationJob

        public DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIcancelDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest cancelDeliverabilitySimulationJob(@Nonnull
                                                                                                                     UUID testId,
                                                                                                                     @Nonnull
                                                                                                                     UUID jobId)
        Cancel deliverability simulation job Cancel a running or paused simulation job.
        Parameters:
        testId - (required)
        jobId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIcancelDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • createDeliverabilitySimulationJob

        public DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIcreateDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest createDeliverabilitySimulationJob(@Nonnull
                                                                                                                     UUID testId,
                                                                                                                     @Nonnull
                                                                                                                     CreateDeliverabilitySimulationJobOptions createDeliverabilitySimulationJobOptions)
        Create deliverability simulation job Create and start a simulation job for a running deliverability test. Only one active simulation job is allowed per user.
        Parameters:
        testId - (required)
        createDeliverabilitySimulationJobOptions - (required)
        Returns:
        APIcreateDeliverabilitySimulationJobRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

        Status Code Description Response Headers

      • exportDeliverabilityTestResults

        public DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIexportDeliverabilityTestResultsRequest exportDeliverabilityTestResults(@Nonnull
                                                                                                                 UUID testId)
        Export deliverability/load test entity results as CSV Export per-entity deliverability results including expectation-level pass/fail counts. The latest status is evaluated with the same polling safeguards before export.
        Parameters:
        testId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIexportDeliverabilityTestResultsRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -

      • pollDeliverabilityTestStatus

        public DeliverabilityTestControllerApi.APIpollDeliverabilityTestStatusRequest pollDeliverabilityTestStatus(@Nonnull
                                                                                                           UUID testId)
        Poll deliverability/load test status Poll test progress. Evaluation is throttled with a 5-second cache window to protect backing data stores.
        Parameters:
        testId - (required)
        Returns:
        APIpollDeliverabilityTestStatusRequest
        Http Response Details:
        Response Details
        Status Code Description Response Headers
        200 OK -
